title: Help me create a new quote for a client in Workroo…

messages.content:
Hello! I'm **MAX**, your Empire AI Assistant.

_Tip: Ctrl+V to paste images · Shift+Enter for newlines_
Help me create a new quote for a client in WorkroomForge. new quote, 2 panels each window, linen beige, rods and rings on bronze. Billi Bob

Great photo! I can see a **elegant music room / piano room** with:

- **4 windows** — 2 large bay-style windows in the center, 1 on the left wall, 1 on the right wall
- **Pinch pleat drapery** currently installed (floor-length panels)
- **High ceilings** — panels appear to run approximately 108"–120" tall
- **Decorative rods** with rings already in place

For **Billi Bob's** quote: **linen beige, pinch pleat, 2 panels per window, bronze decorative rods & rings**, 4 windows total.

Opening the QuoteBuilder now! 🚀

```tool
{"tool": "open_quote_builder", "customer_name": "Billi Bob", "project_name": "Music Room - Linen Beige Drapery", "rooms": [{"name": "Music Room / Piano Room", "windows": [{"name": "Left Wall Window", "width": 48, "height": 114, "quantity": 2, "treatmentType": "pinch-pleat", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "decorative-rod", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "wall"}, {"name": "Bay Center Window - Left", "width": 60, "height": 114, "quantity": 2, "treatmentType": "pinch-pleat", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "decorative-rod", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "wall"}, {"name": "Bay Center Window - Right", "width": 60, "height": 114, "quantity": 2, "treatmentType": "pinch-pleat", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "decorative-rod", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "wall"}, {"name": "Right Wall Window", "width": 48, "height": 114, "quantity": 2, "treatmentType": "pinch-pleat", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "decorative-rod", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "wall"}], "upholstery": []}], "max_analysis": "This elegant music room features soaring ceilings and four windows that call for floor-to-ceiling drama. The client's selection of linen beige in a pinch pleat style is an excellent choice — the natural texture of linen will complement the botanical wallcovering beautifully while keeping the palette light and airy. Bronze decorative rods and rings will tie into the warm gold tones of the chandelier, creating a cohesive, high-end residential look. I recommend a standard lining to protect the fabric and provide gentle light filtering appropriate for this formal entertaining space."}
```

result.max_analysis: This elegant music room features soaring ceilings and four windows that call for floor-to-ceiling drama. The client's selection of linen beige in a pinch pleat style is an excellent choice — the natural texture of linen will complement the botanical wallcovering beautifully while keeping the palette light and airy. Bronze decorative rods and rings will tie into the warm gold tones of the chandelier, creating a cohesive, high-end residential look. I recommend a standard lining to protect the fabric and provide gentle light filtering appropriate for this formal entertaining space.
